purpose: Bootstrap-fallback anchors when external ~/.claude/research/ is missing. Fresh-machine and cross-runtime portability invariant. Production deployments should always prefer external ~/.claude/research/ as primary; this snapshot is a last-resort fallback selected by `lib/runtime-overlay/research-core-select.ts` resolver.
